design: ESPN-2K5-street x Royal-Match ladder. Each level = hit the target score before the clock (miss cap adds pressure). Clear -> advance + coins/XP; fail -> retry the same level, no backslide. First 10 handcrafted for feel, formula extrapolates beyond.

beyond.notes: past the authored list: target grows 12%/level from the last authored one, time shrinks 1s/level to a floor, misses fixed
